title: Yanbu Heat Wave
lead: Yanbu is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.29. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Yanbu has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 10.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 39%, and the wind speed is approximately 3.5 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to this critical event.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
